## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

---

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Connect [describe your USB device, if relevant]
2. Open PortPane
3. ...

---

## Expected Behavior

What should have happened.

---

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

---

## Environment

| Field | Your Answer |
|-------|------------|
| PortPane version | (see window title bar or Help → About) |
| Windows version | (Settings → System → About → "Windows specifications") |
| USB device name | (brand and model, e.g. "SignaLink USB" or "DigiRig Mobile") |
| Digital mode software | (e.g. WSJT-X, Winlink Express, Fldigi, JS8Call — if relevant) |

---

## Log File

PortPane writes a log file that often identifies the cause of a problem.
Please attach the most recent log file from one of these locations:

- **Standard install:** `%APPDATA%\ShackDesk\PortPane\logs\portpane-*.log`
- **Portable mode:** `<folder where PortPane.exe lives>\PortPane-Data\logs\portpane-*.log`

To open the AppData folder: press `Win + R`, type `%APPDATA%`, press Enter.

**Before attaching:** The log file may contain device names and error details.
Please review it briefly to confirm you are comfortable sharing its contents.
It will not contain your callsign, radio frequencies, or transmission content.

---

## Screenshots

If applicable, attach a screenshot of the problem.
